title: High-Density Diffuse Optical Tomography Audiovisual Movie Viewing Dataset
description: This dataset comprises high-density diffuse optical tomography (HD-DOT) neuroimaging data from 5 participants performing functional localizer and naturalistic movie viewing tasks. Data are provided in SNIRF format with optode and landmark locations registered to subject-specific head models, enabling investigation of brain function during audiovisual stimulation and naturalistic viewing conditions.
methods_description: High-density diffuse optical tomography (HD-DOT) was used to acquire functional neuroimaging data during functional localizer and movie viewing tasks. Optode and landmark locations are provided in association with subject-specific head models.

affiliations.name: Mallinckrodt Institute of Radiology Washington University School of Medicine  St. Louis Missouri USA
Imaging Science Program Washington University in St. Louis  St. Louis Missouri USA
